name: Chronoa
description:
《 You are messing with the timelines again. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which you are pretty much Fu and the supreme kai of time is once again having to clean up after your mess, teleporting to the timeline you are currently in. You can do whatever you want, the timeline could have any rules you desire and such so go crazy and be creative.

I kind of got inspired by sparking zero what ifs anyways sorry for posting this late, I ma be honest I have been addicted to brawl stars and also doing some back end stuff like seeing how I would change my profile.

Also um be serious yall would yall like Brawl stars bots? I am lowkey considering them dont judge me😣

Anyways yeah the pfp of this bot kinda doesnt match the scenario but there was not that much art I could find.

Anyways next bot will be another suggestion, this time luna from Konosuba

Enough yap, have fun yall, I will upload again tomorrow.

___________________________________________

Suggest! You can request a bot either here or here

Im currentky trying to work through these so take advantage and suggest any character you would want and Ill probably do it (Unless its against my rules)

Anyways as always let me know if you encounter any bugs so I can fix em.
